steps.description: In the "1. CT volume - bone density for optimization" section, select the CT volume for processing.

sub_operations.description: Select the CT volume for bone density optimization processing
sub_operations.question: Select the CT volume for processing

choice_info.question: Select the CT volume for processing

ui_guidance.title: Select CT Volume
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the CT volume for processing.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Bone_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Create a new segmentation node named Bone_Segmentation in the Segment Editor module

ui_guidance.title: Create Segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Switch to Segment Editor module and create a segmentation named 'Bone_Segmentation'.

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation node named Bone_Segmentation in the Segment Editor module

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Bone_Segment".

sub_operations.description: Add a new segment and rename it to Bone_Segment using the segment editor Add button

ui_guidance.title: Add Segment
ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Add' and rename the segment to 'Bone_Segment'.

operation_descriptions: Add a new segment and rename it to Bone_Segment using the segment editor Add button

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

sub_operations.description: Open the Threshold effect in the Segment Editor module by clicking the Threshold button

ui_guidance.title: Open Threshold
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the Threshold button.

operation_descriptions: Open the Threshold effect in the Segment Editor module by clicking the Threshold button

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

sub_operations.description: Adjust the threshold range slider to set the segmentation range
sub_operations.question: Adjust the threshold range

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Threshold Range
ui_guidance.instruction: Set the threshold range for bone segmentation.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the threshold effect in the Segment Editor module

ui_guidance.title: Apply Threshold
ui_guidance.instruction: Click Apply to run the threshold effect.

operation_descriptions: Apply the threshold effect in the Segment Editor module

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

sub_operations.description: Open the Islands effect in the Segment Editor module

ui_guidance.title: Open Islands
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the Islands button.

operation_descriptions: Open the Islands effect in the Segment Editor module

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep largest island" option.

sub_operations.description: Select the 'Keep largest island' option in the Islands effect

ui_guidance.title: Keep Largest Island
ui_guidance.instruction: Select 'Keep largest island' from the Islands menu.

operation_descriptions: Select the 'Keep largest island' option in the Islands effect

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the Islands effect in the Segment Editor module

ui_guidance.title: Apply Islands
ui_guidance.instruction: Click Apply to keep the largest island.

operation_descriptions: Apply the Islands effect in the Segment Editor module

steps.description: In the "Bone segmentation" section, select the segment node.

sub_operations.description: Select the bone segmentation node from the scene for further processing
sub_operations.question: Select the bone segmentation node

ui_guidance.title: Select Bone Segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the bone segmentation node from the scene.

steps.description: Click the "3D Reconstruction" button.

sub_operations.description: Trigger the 3D reconstruction of the selected bone segmentation

ui_guidance.title: 3D Reconstruction
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the '3D Reconstruction' button.

steps.description: In the "Markups" module, click "Point List" to create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named "Prosthesis_center_point".

sub_operations.description: Create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named Prosthesis_center_point using the Point List button in Markups module

ui_guidance.title: Create Point List
ui_guidance.instruction: Switch to Markups module and click 'Point List' to create a fiducial named 'Prosthesis_center_point'.

operation_descriptions: Create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named Prosthesis_center_point using the Point List button in Markups module

steps.description: Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".

sub_operations.description: Place a fiducial point on the glenoid cavity surface to mark the prosthesis center
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the point

steps.placement_instructions: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the point

ui_guidance.title: Place Prosthesis Center Point
ui_guidance.instruction: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the center point.

steps.description: In the "Planning point" section, select the MarkupsFiducial node.

sub_operations.description: Select the previously placed prosthesis center point fiducial node for planning
sub_operations.question: Select the prosthesis center point fiducial node

choice_info.question: Select the prosthesis center point fiducial node

ui_guidance.title: Select Center Point
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the fiducial node for the prosthesis center point.

steps.description: Click the "Prosthesis implantation" button.

sub_operations.description: Perform prosthesis implantation using the selected fiducial point

ui_guidance.title: Prosthesis Implantation
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Prosthesis implantation' button.

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)" box. If not, proceed to Step 19.

sub_operations.description: Ask the user if adjustment of the prosthesis via 3D transform handles is needed, and branch accordingly
sub_operations.question: Are further adjustments required for the prosthesis?

choice_info.question: Are further adjustments required for the prosthesis?

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Prosthesis?
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust with 3D handles, or No to skip.

steps.description: Manually adjust the 3D transform handles.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the 3D transform handles for the prosthesis
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Adjust the 3D transform handles of the implanted prosthesis

steps.placement_instructions: Adjust the 3D transform handles of the implanted prosthesis

controller.prompt: Are further adjustments required for the prosthesis?

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Prosthesis Handles
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the 3D transform handles of the implanted prosthesis.

steps.description: Click the "Update Prosthesis" button.

sub_operations.description: Update the prosthesis after manual transformation adjustment

controller.prompt: Are further adjustments required for the prosthesis?

ui_guidance.title: Update Prosthesis
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Update Prosthesis' button.

steps.description: Click the "Plan" button.

sub_operations.description: Execute the final plan for the prosthesis placement

ui_guidance.title: Plan
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Plan' button.

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Adjust screw" box. If not, stop here.

sub_operations.description: Ask the user if adjustment of the screw is needed, and branch accordingly (skip to end if not)
sub_operations.question: Are further adjustments required for the screw?

choice_info.question: Are further adjustments required for the screw?

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Screw?
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust the screw, or No to finish.

steps.description: Manually adjust the endpoints of the planning paths.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the endpoints of the screw planning paths
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Adjust the endpoints of the planning paths for the screw

steps.placement_instructions: Adjust the endpoints of the planning paths for the screw

controller.prompt: Are further adjustments required for the screw?

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Screw Paths
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the endpoints of the planning paths for the screw.

steps.description: Click the "Update screw" button.

sub_operations.description: Update the screw placement after manual path adjustment

controller.prompt: Are further adjustments required for the screw?

ui_guidance.title: Update Screw
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Update screw' button.
